since_last: 77% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +4.17%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 77% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.69% · BTC +0.41% · Gold +1.23% · Nasdaq100 +1.31%. 77% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +4.17%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, Data Center, Power & Energy lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +4.17%; weakest is Data Center, Power & Energy at +1.08%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CEVA is the standout at +11.12%
cards.body: Leaders: CEVA +11.12%, AMD +7.66%, ANET +7.63%, S +7.02%, VRT +6.86%. Laggards: AVAV -5.97%, UPST -2.21%, OKLO -2.10%, SNAP -1.55%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.89% at $160.56
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.89% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
